guardrails.title: Safety rules
guardrails.summary: Human-reviewed AI. No automatic emails, drafts, or CRM changes.
guardrails.workspaceDescription: This workspace centralizes review and sync work. Sync and review actions remain manual.
guardrails.aiSuggestionsDescription: Review suggestions here, then open details for any explicit apply action.
guardrails.syncedEmailsDescription: AI actions on synced emails use metadata/snippets only and create suggestions for human review.

dashboard.subtitle: Monitor what needs attention across CRM, AI, email, and calendar.

aiWorkspace.title: Unified Review Hub

aiSuggestions.title: AI Suggestions
aiSuggestions.subtitle: Review AI-generated recommendations before applying anything. Human approval is required, and this queue never sends email or changes CRM records automatically.
aiSuggestions.boardSubtitle: Review AI suggestions visually by status. Cards only open details; email sending, Gmail drafts, and CRM apply actions still require explicit human action on the detail page.

board.pendingDescription: Needs human review before anything can happen.
board.acceptedDescription: Approved suggestions that still have no completed action.
board.completedDescription: Accepted suggestions with applied CRM or Gmail draft actions.
board.expiredDescription: Suggestions that are no longer active.

list.searchPlaceholder: Search title, output, or source context
list.tryClearingFilters: Try clearing filters or searching for a different source context.
list.generateSuggestionsHint: Generate suggestions from synced emails, synced calendar events, or lead detail pages to start reviewing AI-assisted recommendations.

detail.pageSubtitle: Review the recommendation, source context, safety flags, and explicit human actions.
detail.decisionDashboardDescription: Understand the AI recommendation, source context, safety checks, review state, and explicit next actions in one place.
detail.decisionHeroDescription: This dashboard separates generated AI output from source data and shows which human-controlled actions are available.
detail.aiRecommendationDescription: Generated text is shown exactly as stored. Review it before accepting, rejecting, or applying an explicit action.
detail.suggestedActionHelper: What the AI is asking you to consider next.
detail.importanceOrPriorityHelper: Risk, importance, priority, or tone depending on suggestion type.
detail.reviewStatusHelper: Accept/reject only records a human review decision.
detail.outputLanguageHelper: Language requested when this AI output was generated.
detail.completedActionsSummaryHelper: Explicit actions already completed from this suggestion.
detail.advancedMetadataDescription: Technical details are kept here for audit and troubleshooting without crowding the review decision.
detail.calendarTaskCompletedSafety: Created by explicit human action. No email was sent automatically, and no opportunity, contact, company, or note was created automatically.
detail.calendarNoteCompletedSafety: Created by explicit human action. No email was sent automatically, and no opportunity, contact, company, or task was created automatically.
detail.calendarLeadCompletedSafety: Created by explicit human action. No email was sent automatically, and no company, contact, task, or note was created automatically.
detail.createCalendarTaskTitle: Create CRM task from reviewed calendar event
detail.createCalendarNoteTitle: Create CRM note from reviewed calendar event
detail.createCalendarLeadTitle: Create CRM opportunity from reviewed calendar event
detail.createCalendarTaskDescription: This creates one official CRM task from the accepted calendar review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email. No task is created automatically.
detail.createCalendarNoteDescription: This creates one official CRM note from the accepted calendar review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email. No note is created automatically.
detail.createCalendarLeadDescription: This creates one official CRM opportunity from the accepted calendar review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email. No opportunity is created automatically.
detail.calendarTaskPayloadDescription: The task will include safe synced calendar metadata, AI summary, reasoning, event identifiers, and a human approval notice. No company, contact, opportunity, note, or email will be created automatically.
detail.calendarNotePayloadDescription: The note will include safe synced calendar metadata, AI summary, reasoning, event identifiers, and a human approval notice. No company, contact, opportunity, task, or email will be created automatically.
detail.calendarLeadPayloadDescription: The opportunity will include safe synced calendar metadata, AI summary, reasoning, event identifiers, and a human approval notice. Existing company or contact links are reused only if already present on the suggestion. No company, contact, task, note, or email will be created automatically.
detail.createEmailTaskTitle: Create CRM task from reviewed email
detail.createEmailNoteTitle: Create CRM note from reviewed email
detail.createEmailLeadTitle: Create CRM opportunity from reviewed email
detail.createEmailTaskDescription: This creates one official CRM task from the accepted email review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email.
detail.createEmailNoteDescription: This creates one official CRM note from the accepted email review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email.
detail.createEmailLeadDescription: This creates one official CRM opportunity from the accepted email review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email.
detail.emailTaskPayloadDescription: The task will include safe synced email metadata, AI summary, reasoning, and a human approval notice. No contact, opportunity, or email will be created.
detail.emailNotePayloadDescription: The note will include safe synced email metadata and the AI suggested note. No contact, opportunity, task, or email will be created.
detail.emailLeadPayloadDescription: The opportunity will include safe synced email metadata, AI summary, reasoning, external identifiers, and a human approval notice. Existing company or contact links are reused only if already present on the suggestion.
detail.title: Title
detail.reviewDecisionDescription: Accepting or rejecting this suggestion only records a human review decision. It does not update CRM records, create tasks, create notes, create opportunities, or send emails.
detail.reviewNotePlaceholder: Add context about why you accept or reject this suggestion...

detail.emailNoteCreatedSuccess: CRM note created from external email review. Note ID:

detail.calendarNoteCreatedSuccess: CRM note created from external calendar review. Note ID:
detail.calendarLeadCreatedSuccess: CRM opportunity created from external calendar review. Opportunity ID:

detail.reviewRejected: Suggestion rejected. No CRM changes were applied.
detail.nextStepAppliedSuccess: Next step applied to the lead.
detail.reviewOutputFirst: Review the AI output first, then decide whether to accept, reject, or run one of the explicit apply actions.
detail.completeAiResponse: The complete AI-generated response is preserved here for review.
detail.sourceDescription: The AI suggestion is grounded in this loaded context. Full identifiers remain available in Technical details.
detail.emailDraftSafetyDescription: Review the suggested reply before creating anything in Gmail. Creating a Gmail draft requires your explicit action, and no email is sent automatically.
detail.subject: Subject
detail.gmailDraftCreatedNotice: A Gmail draft was created. The email was NOT sent automatically.
detail.createGmailDraftDescription: A Gmail draft will be created, but no email will be sent automatically.
detail.emailMetadataMissing: Email metadata relation was not loaded.
detail.calendarMetadataMissing: Calendar metadata relation was not loaded.
detail.emailReviewDescription: This recommendation was generated from synced email metadata/snippet only. It does not create CRM records or send emails automatically.
detail.calendarReviewDescription: This recommendation was generated from synced calendar metadata only. It does not create CRM records, tasks, notes, or emails automatically.
